text: In these two moments, I feel a sense of openness and curiosity. The first scene, with its spacious and minimalist interior, invites solitude and reflection, as if I am both welcomed and dwarfed by the architecture. The second scene, teeming with vibrant colors and intellectual stimuli, awakens my inquisitive nature. Here, I am surrounded by ideas and innovations, each detail asking me to ponder the interplay between humanity and technology. In both spaces, I sense the weight of possibility—one quiet and contemplative, the other dynamically engaging.
